name: AI/ML Pipeline
description: An AI/ML architecture encompassing both inference serving and model training pipelines. External users interact through an API tier that routes to inference endpoints, while data scientists and MLOps teams manage training pipelines, model versioning, and deployment. Special attention to prompt injection defense, model supply chain integrity, training data poisoning, and PII/sensitive data handling throughout the pipeline.

zones.name: external
zones.description: External consumers submitting inference requests, prompts, or queries. Input is untrusted and may contain adversarial content such as prompt injection attacks, jailbreak attempts, or malformed payloads.

zones.name: api-tier
zones.description: The API serving layer that handles authentication, rate limiting, input preprocessing, and routing to appropriate inference endpoints. Performs initial content filtering and prompt safety checks.

zones.name: inference
zones.description: The inference tier running model serving infrastructure. Includes LLM endpoints, embedding generation, retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, and output safety guardrails. Models are loaded from the model store and executed in isolated environments.

zones.name: training
zones.description: The model training environment where data scientists develop, train, and evaluate models. Isolated from production inference to prevent training workloads from affecting serving latency.

zones.name: model-store
zones.description: The model artifact storage and registry containing trained model weights, configurations, and deployment metadata. Models are cryptographically signed and versioned to ensure supply chain integrity.

zones.name: data-tier
zones.description: The data persistence layer containing training datasets, vector indices for RAG, feature stores, and evaluation benchmarks. Subject to data classification, PII filtering, and access controls based on data sensitivity.

mermaid_template:
flowchart TB
    subgraph external["External (Untrusted)"]
        user[End User]
        app_client[Application Client]
        chatbot[Chatbot Interface]
    end
    subgraph api["API Tier (Semi-Trusted)"]
        gw(API Gateway)
        limiter(Rate Limiter)
        sanitizer(Input Sanitizer)
    end
    subgraph inference_tier["Inference (Trusted)"]
        llm(LLM Inference Server)
        embed(Embedding Service)
        rag(RAG Pipeline)
        guardrail(Output Guardrails)
    end
    subgraph training_tier["Training (Trusted)"]
        pipeline(Training Pipeline)
        experiment(Experiment Tracker)
        gpu(GPU Cluster)
    end
    subgraph models["Model Store (Highly Trusted)"]
        registry(Model Registry)
        artifacts[(Model Artifacts)]
    end
    subgraph data["Data Tier (Highly Trusted)"]
        vectordb[(Vector Database)]
        traindata[(Training Datasets)]
        features[(Feature Store)]
    end
    user -->|HTTPS| gw
    app_client -->|HTTPS| gw
    chatbot -->|HTTPS| gw
    gw --> limiter
    limiter --> sanitizer
    sanitizer -->|Validated Input| llm
    sanitizer -->|Validated Input| rag
    rag --> embed
    embed -->|Vector Search| vectordb
    rag -->|Context| llm
    llm --> guardrail
    guardrail -->|Safe Output| gw
    llm -->|Load Model| artifacts
    registry --> artifacts
    pipeline --> experiment
    pipeline --> gpu
    gpu -->|Read| traindata
    gpu -->|Read| features
    pipeline -->|Publish Model| registry
